findings.description: Pinned package name 'expres' (ecosystem=npm) is Levenshtein distance 1 from canonical popular package 'express'. Typosquatting risk per Radaro AI-Assisted Development Policy v1.3 §8.2.
findings.fix: Verify 'expres' is the package you actually intended to install. If it should be 'express', remove 'expres' and pin 'express' instead.
findings.title: Lockfile pins 'expres' looks like typosquat of 'express'
